name: effect-hcloud-workspace
description: Generator + dual-target (Effect v3/v4) SDK for the Hetzner Cloud API, published as @triargos/effect-hcloud

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:v3 && npm run typecheck:v4
scripts.build: npm run build:v3 && npm run build:v4
scripts.regen: npm run fetch-spec && npm run generate && npm run typecheck
scripts.publish:v4: node scripts/set-v4-version.mjs && cd packages/v4 && npm publish
